creator: manu@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Alexey Dokuchaev from comment #5)
Unless you want us to stay on very old version of mesa this will never happens.
LLVM_DEFAULT will always lag.
There is more component than swrast that requires llvm in mesa (crocus/iris/clover/etc ...) and they all require a higher version of llvm than LLVM_DEFAULT.
